title: Warm Yeasty American Kimchi Burger
description: A diabetic-friendly burger featuring yeast-raised buns, fermented kimchi, and a sweet and savory flavor profile, perfect for a hangover cure.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine yeast, flour, sugar, and 1 cup of warm water to make the yeast-raised buns.
Knead the dough for 10 minutes until smooth and elastic, then let it rise in a warm place for 1 hour.
Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium-high heat and cook the ground beef patties for 4-5 minutes per side.
Butter the buns and toast them on the grill or in a toaster.
Assemble the burgers with a beef patty, a slice of cheese, a spoonful of kimchi, lettuce, tomato, and pickles.
Place the burgers under the broiler for 1-2 minutes to melt the cheese.
Let the burgers rest for a few minutes before serving to allow the juices to redistribute.
